title: Intense Crisp Ukrainian Cheese Skillet
description: A one-pot Ukrainian dish featuring crispy cheese slices and a tangy mustard flavor, suitable for a Buddhist temple gathering.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the prepared mustard and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced potato and cook until it is tender and lightly browned.
Add the cheese slices to the skillet and cook until they are crispy and golden brown.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a small bowl, mix the water and sodium alginate to create a spherification bath.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cheese mixture into the spherification bath and let them cook for 1 minute.
Remove the cheese spheres from the bath and add them to the skillet.
Serve the intense crisp Ukrainian cheese skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
